programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with the creation of this unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments, and has broadcast globally in over 150 countries and territories. programme.desc: A Confederate major and his men rob a U.S. mint, then go to Mexico to buy guns and ammo.

programme.title: The Lone Hand
programme.desc: Pinkerton detective (Joel McCrea) poses as outlaw without telling wife (Barbara Hale).

programme.title: Cattle Drive
programme.desc: Cowboy (Joel McCrea) puts rail tycoon's spoiled son (Dean Stockwell) to work.

programme.title: Wagon Train: Season 2, Episode 21: The Martha Barham Story
programme.desc: A young woman joins the wagon train, mourning the recent death of her husband in the Civil War. Struggling to cope with her grief while facing the harsh realities of the trail, she encounters a fellow traveler whose own troubled past helps her confront her loss and find the strength to look toward the future

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 3 Badge Without Honor
programme.desc: A retired lawman arrives in Virginia City, but his presence stirs up trouble when a vengeful outlaw recognizes him from his past. As the two prepare for a final, inevitable confrontation, the Cartwrights find themselves caught in the middle of a moral dilemma between upholding the law and personal justice.

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 2 The Mission
programme.desc: While traveling through the desert, the Cartwrights encounter a distraught woman whose husband has been held captive by a reclusive tribe for years. Touched by her plight, the family decides to abandon their original plans to help her navigate the dangerous terrain and attempt a daring rescue mission

programme.title: Wagon Train: Season 2, Episode 32: The Stage Coach Story
programme.desc: When a stagecoach is forced to take refuge at the wagon train camp after an encounter with hostile outlaws, the passengers bring with them a mysterious cargo and a dangerous secret. As the wagon train party works to protect them, they discover that one of the passengers is hiding a deadly truth that puts the entire expedition at risk.

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E22 Little Britches,
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark pursues Alice "Little Britches" McJunkin, a young woman who has turned to a life of crime in the Wyoming Territory. As Clark attempts to apprehend her, he must reconcile his duty to uphold the law with the complex circumstances that led the young girl into the company of notorious outlaws

programme.title: This Man Can't Die
programme.desc: Bounty hunter Martin Benson seeks the leader of a vicious outlaw smuggler gang who killed his parents and raped his sister, while his other siblings hide a wounded gang member in hopes of more info and try to help.

programme.title: The Outlaw (1943) Colorized
programme.desc: Howard Hughes’ infamous Western The Outlaw blazes with passion, rivalry, and danger. When Billy the Kid (Jack Buetel) rides into town, he becomes entangled in a volatile triangle with gunslinger Doc Holliday (Walter Huston) and lawman Pat Garrett (Thomas Mitchell). But it’s the fiery beauty Rio (Jane Russell, in her breakout role) who sparks the most dangerous conflict of all. With smoldering romance, tense standoffs, and Hughes’ bold style, this legendary film pushed boundaries and made Hollywood history.

programme.title: Bells of Rosarita
programme.desc: Sue Farnum inherits a circus, but her dead father's partner is trying to take it away from her. Roy and Bob Nolan are filming a movie on location at the circus. They and a number of other western movie stars come to Sue's aid, putting on a show and catching the bad guys

programme.title: Enemy Of The Law
programme.desc: Willis Newcomb and Bart Carroll head a gang engaged in smuggling wanted-American criminals back into the United States from Mexico. Operating from Sharperville, an oil town on the American side of the border, they transport their human cargo in oil drums loaded on trucks. Border Patrolman Tom Sharper intercepts one of the trucks but is overpowered and left for dead

programme.title: Arizona
programme.desc: In Tucson of the 1860s, a pioneer woman struggles to succeed in the freight and cattle business while at risk at the hands of corrupt and violent local businessmen and rampaging Indians.

programme.title: Hot Hot Heat
programme.desc: Join host Nick Uhas and his guests as they discover the unstable world of elemental gasses. This week's experiments include recreating a big bang with lithium, the incendiary power of methane, and how a little bit of liquified nitrogen can lend a lot of power to a rocket.

programme.title: Vanilla
programme.desc: In 1841 on the small island of Réunion, a 12-year-old slave did something no one had done before; artificially pollinate the vanilla plant. The vanilla bean took the world by storm, sparking the artificial flavor revolution and forever changing how we eat.

programme.title: Fairbanks, Alaska
